mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ntc_message (sender_id, receiver_id, title, content, msg_type) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{msgType})
mapper.update: UPDATE ntc_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ntc_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
